tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Every Time I Look At You

content:
[Verse 1]

[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I got to tell you what I'm feeling inside[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I could lie to myself but it's true[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
There's no de-nyin when I look in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Girl I'm out of my head over you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I lived so long be-lieving all love is blind[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
But everything about you is tellin me this time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
It's for-ev-er, this time I know it there's no doubt in my mind[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
For-ev-er. Until my life is through, girl I'll be lovin you for-ev-er.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I hear the echo of the promise I made[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
When your strong you can stand on your own[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
But those words grow distant as I look in your face.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
No I don't wanna go it alone.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
I never thought I'd lay my heart on the line[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
But everything about you is telling me this time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
It's for-ev-er, this time I know it there's no doubt in my mind[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
For-ev-er. Until my life is through, girl I'll be lovin you for-ev-er.[/tab]


[Solo]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
  I see my future when I look in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
  It took your love to make my heart come alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
  Cause I lived my life believing all love is blind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
But everything about you is tellin' me this time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
It's for-ev-er, this time I know it there's no doubt in my mind[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
For-ev-er. Until my life is through, girl I'll be lovin you for-ev-er.[/tab]
